summary: The conversation appears to be about a visa application process. Speaker 0 is guiding Speaker 1 through the process, discussing the costs, biometrics, and timeline. Speaker 1 is seeking clarification on various aspects of the process. The conversation also touches on the location of the office where Speaker 1 needs to visit for the biometrics. The tone of the conversation is informative and helpful.

key_discussion_points.details: The process will take 40 days, and the biometrics will be done within the first 10-15 days. The total cost is 18-18 lakh, which needs to be paid by post.
The biometrics will be done within the first 10-15 days, and the total process will take 40 days.
The total cost is 18-18 lakh, which needs to be paid by post. The ticket and embassy fee will be covered.
The office is located in Jalandhar, and Speaker 0 will WhatsApp the address to Speaker 1.

action_items.task: Pay the visa application fee of 18-18 lakh by post
Visit the office in Jalandhar for biometrics
